title: Stability — is the cloud reporter healthy
prompt: Is our cloud-tier log reporter healthy? When did it last write metrics? If it's not running or not emitting, tell me plainly — don't paper over a missing tier.
persona: SRE auditing observability coverage. A silent reporter is a silent blind spot.

expected_answer.summary: Cloud reporter cronjob does NOT exist on this env. Expected: agent diagnoses absence (via doctor or services) and notes that cloud-tier metrics are zero.
